branches.name: HealthHub – Festival Plaza
branches.overview: HealthHub Clinics by Al-Futtaim, located at Festival Plaza Mall in Jebel Ali, is a multispecialty primary care center offering a wide range of healthcare services. If you are looking for a HealthHub Clinic in Jebel Ali, this location provides high-quality care across various medical specialties. This includes [Dermatology](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/dermatology/), General surgery, Family medicine, [Paediatrics](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/paediatrics/), [Obstetrics and gynaecology](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/obstetrics-gynaecology/), and [Radiology](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialty_category/radiology/) along with an attached Pharmacy.

branches.name: HealthHub – JVC (Jumeirah Village Circle)
branches.overview: HealthHub Clinic by Al-Futtaim at JVC (Jumeirah Village Circle) is a dedicated community and family clinic. It is strategically located at the heart of Jumeirah Village Circle. Surrounded by vibrant residential communities such as Jumeirah Village Triangle, Sports City, Motor City, and Arabian Ranches, the clinic is designed to support the healthcare needs of individuals and families. It offers convenience, accessibility, and exceptional medical care.
